creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this fun and therapeutic activity! 🤎

If you want to do something different in Dubai, check out the pottery classes @yadaweistudio. I signed up for “Pottery on the wheel” beginner session. 

💰 210 AED 
🏺This includes:
• tools and clay to make a basic bowl or cup
• step by step guide
• learning the basics of wheel throwing techniques for creating pottery
• glazing session of your finished project after 2 weeks

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments.

transcription.text: I leave all the windows open, let the light come through Sunshine, warm and golden, morning, making all things new
